events.title: Microsoft joins AI cost-cutting trend by relying more on its own models

events.title: Grok 4.5 is so cheap compared to Fable 5 and GPT 5.5 that benchmark gaps may not matter much

events.title: ChatGPT can now listen and talk at the same time, making AI conversations seem more human
events.reason: 边听边说的全双工架构让AI更像人，这是产品经理设计对话体验的转折点。
